use_cases: Display a visual preview of a light theme UI design for theme selection interfaces
Serve as a placeholder mockup illustration in design tools or documentation
ai_summary: An SVG illustration depicting a light-themed UI mockup with wireframe-style placeholder elements including circles, rectangles, and text lines in neutral gray tones. This atomic component functions as a visual preview asset commonly used in theme selectors, design galleries, or as a static illustration in documentation and landing pages.
